case_title: FIELDING, DOUGLAS vs. THE LEWIS GROUP,INC. A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDING, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT THE LEWIS GROUP, INC. A SOUTH CAROLINA CORP. DBA: THE LEWIS GROUP
